name: Holo Q
summary: A real AI that thinks entirely in your browser no server, no cloud, no API key.

description.p: An AI answer is normally something a server produced and you must trust; it should be something you can prove.
The whole model runs on your GPU from a content-addressed disk verified byte-for-byte, and every answer is a re-derivable inference receipt (Law L5).

ul: No server ever sees your prompt
The model is verified off the substrate
Every inference is a reproducible receipt

releases.description: Verifiable inference (ADR-0052), the inference counterpart to Holo Forge (ADR-0051): a real browser-native LLM (the QVAC WebGPU engine, consumed unmodified) where the model is a content-addressed κ-disk verified sector-by-sector off the substrate, and every answer is a re-derivable PROV-O inference receipt sealed to a did:holo. Greedy decode is deterministic, so an output re-derives byte-for-byte with no server (Law L5); tamper is refused. κ-memo gives O(1) reuse; the conscience gate (ADR-033) self-verifies and judges every answer. Serverless, lean, 100% anchored in the UOR substrate.
